# SDK-style Project Conversion Progress

## Overview

This scenario converted `CSharpBible/AddPageWPF/AddPageWPF.csproj` from the legacy project format to SDK-style without changing its target framework. The work was completed in two steps: project conversion first, then validation of the converted result.

**Progress**: 2/2 tasks complete <progress value="100" max="100"></progress> 100%

## Tasks

- ✅ 01-convert-addpagewpf: Convert AddPageWPF to SDK-style ([Content](tasks/01-convert-addpagewpf/task.md), [Progress](tasks/01-convert-addpagewpf/progress-details.md))
- ✅ 02-validate-addpagewpf: Validate the converted project ([Content](tasks/02-validate-addpagewpf/task.md), [Progress](tasks/02-validate-addpagewpf/progress-details.md))
